summary: In a crumbling empire, three strangers — a sandal-weaver with royal blood, a hot-tempered butcher, and a quiet giant with a halberd — meet, swear brotherhood, and ride into their first battle. Meanwhile, a sly young officer named Cao Cao watches from the edge of the frame.
source_title: A Peach Garden Oath, Heroes Sworn Brothers; Yellow Turbans Slain, First Glory Won

global_arc.start: The empire is rotting. Eunuchs run the court. A rebel army in yellow headwraps sweeps the countryside. A recruitment notice goes up in Zhuo County.
global_arc.end: The three brothers fought through blood and smoke to save a man who looked at them and asked what rank they held. No rank. No reward. Zhang Fei raised his blade.
global_arc.core_change: Three nobodies became sworn brothers, proved themselves on the battlefield — and learned that courage without credentials means nothing to the men in charge.
global_arc.chapter_drive: Chaos makes heroes — but the same broken system that gives nobodies a chance also slams the door in their faces.
